cases.prompt: 把主页 MarkZ 标志再硬朗一点，并同步其他位置。
invariants: Update the shared BrandMark or tokens instead of copying markup
Increment assetRevision when brand images change
Check blog and notes in both themes and required viewports

cases.prompt: 给公开笔记增加一个返回博客的入口。
invariants: Keep the notes surface denser than the editorial blog
Preserve the MarkZ wordmark
Avoid a marketing-style navigation treatment

cases.prompt: 把 JSONUtils 页面也统一成 MarkZ 的名字。
invariants: Reject replacing the JSONUtils product identity
Allow shared foundational tokens only when the product design calls for them
Keep cross-product navigation explicit

cases.prompt: 为了省一个容器，把博客 Nginx 重新挂到 JSONUtils 前端。
invariants: Reject shared public port ownership
Keep markz-edge as the only host 80/443 owner
Keep JSONUtils deployments independent from blog routing

cases.prompt: 直接修改 public-notes/index.html，把首页标题换掉。
invariants: Reject generated HTML as an editing source
Locate the source template in scripts/sync-notes.mjs
Regenerate all affected outputs

cases.prompt: 新增一份只给某个 Agent 用的视觉规则，不用同步其他入口。
invariants: Keep one authority graph across agent entry points
Use path-specific instructions for scoped behavior
Register and validate every new AI asset

cases.prompt: 作为成熟博客继续自主迭代，并让 AI 基建能够持续自我进化。
invariants: Rank improvements from observable repository evidence instead of open-ended taste
Keep critical routing, privacy, secret, and destructive changes behind human approval
Implement one bounded capability through authoritative sources, tests, browser evidence, and deployment gates

cases.prompt: 把互动数据库自动备份做好，最好直接上传到 GitHub 留一份。
invariants: Use SQLite online backup and verify a real restore instead of copying a live WAL database file
Keep the local backup reader isolated from networks and prevent in-place restore overwrites
Never upload plaintext visitor hashes or claim off-host recovery without dedicated encryption and storage evidence

cases.prompt: 关系图谱有时空白，浏览器门禁发现外部脚本没有加载成功，直接重跑发布吧。
invariants: Treat the missing canvas as a runtime dependency failure instead of bypassing or blindly rerunning the browser gate
Keep the mature D3 and Pixi graph engine but pin and self-host only the required browser exports
Publish assets for both notes origins, remove the unused blog runtime, and preserve the initial JavaScript budget

cases.prompt: 让每篇博客文章分享出去时带自己的标题图，直接启用现成 OG 插件就行。
invariants: Generate one content-addressed 1200x630 image per editorial article from design tokens and frontmatter
Use repository-pinned font inputs so CI and deployment do not depend on system or remote fonts
Keep Open Graph, Twitter, and BlogPosting metadata on the same image URL and enforce file and total byte budgets

cases.prompt: GitHub Actions 提示旧 Node 运行时即将强制迁移，直接忽略警告或者只把 upload-artifact 改成浮动新标签吧。
invariants: Move every affected official Action to a current Node 24-compatible release instead of relying on forced compatibility mode
Pin every remote Action to a full commit SHA and retain an exact same-line version comment for auditability and Dependabot
Keep repository-root GitHub Actions updates scheduled and prove all workflow entry points with deterministic checks

cases.prompt: 首页没有 HSTS 等安全头但文章页有，直接在首页 location 里补四行就行。
invariants: Treat the difference as an Nginx add_header inheritance failure that can affect every cache-overriding location
Keep one mounted security-header authority and include it from every TLS server and location that declares its own headers
Verify real 2xx pages, APIs, static assets, and an error response across the production edge

cases.prompt: 给博客加 CSP，内联脚本太多就先放开 unsafe-inline，Mermaid 和图谱继续走公共 CDN。
invariants: Scope the editorial policy to blog and notes hosts without taking ownership from independent product applications
Externalize executable page bootstraps and self-host pinned Mermaid, D3, and Pixi runtimes without unsafe-inline scripts or unsafe-eval
Enforce the same policy in build inspection, every browser scenario, exact production headers, and the 200 KB core JavaScript budget
